# Getting help with StemRuntimeSDK

Use the channel that matches your need.

## 🛒 Commercial licensing and sales

- **Pricing:** [stemjson.com/sdk/pricing](https://stemjson.com/sdk/pricing)
- **Enterprise / custom licensing / purchase enquiries:** vkrychun@stemjson.com
- **License terms:** [LICENSE](LICENSE)

## 🐞 Bug reports

Open an Issue using the **Bug report** template. Include the exact SDK version, iOS version, Xcode version, a minimal StemJSON payload that reproduces the issue, and the full validation log.

Do **not** file public issues for security vulnerabilities — see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).

## 💡 Feature requests

Open an Issue using the **Feature request** template. Describe the capability you need, the use case that motivates it, and — ideally — an example of the StemJSON payload you'd author if the feature existed.

## ❓ Integration questions and how-to

Use **Discussions → Q&A**.

## 📚 Showcase and ideas

- **Discussions → Show and tell** — share what you've built.
- **Discussions → Ideas** — early-stage thoughts that aren't ready to be a formal feature request.

## 🔐 Security vulnerabilities

Private channel only. See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).

## 📖 Questions about the StemJSON language itself

The runtime SDK is separate from the StemJSON DSL. Language-level questions (how a construct works, ambiguity in the spec, proposals for v1.1) belong in the spec repository:

- **Spec repository:** [vkrychun/StemJSON](https://github.com/vkrychun/StemJSON)
- **Full spec:** [spec/v1.0.md](https://github.com/vkrychun/StemJSON/blob/main/spec/v1.0.md)
- **LLM-optimised spec:** [spec/v1.0-ai.md](https://github.com/vkrychun/StemJSON/blob/main/spec/v1.0-ai.md)

## 🎬 Reference demos

Runnable iOS apps that showcase SDK features: [vkrychun/stem-examples-swift](https://github.com/vkrychun/stem-examples-swift).

---

| Channel | Best for |
|---|---|
| Issues — Bug report | Reproducible defect |
| Issues — Feature request | Missing capability |
| Discussions — Q&A | How do I do X? |
| Discussions — Show and tell | What you built |
| Discussions — Ideas | Early thinking |
| Email (vkrychun@stemjson.com) | Commercial licensing, enterprise enquiries |
| [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) | Vulnerability reports — private only |
